The '''Alliance Veteran's Victory Association''', or '''AVVA''', was a retiree's club for [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] veterans with the ambition to be something more. Its members considered themselves for a reserve role in the the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]].

==History==
Around the time of the [[Black Fleet Crisis]], they were led by retired [[Brigadier]] [[Bren Derlin/Legends|Bren Derlin]], and published a news packet titled ''[[Fleet Watch]]''.
